## SpaceX Stock Down ~40% From Post-IPO Peak; Historical Mega-IPO Patterns Analyzed

A 40% drawdown from the IPO peak in a high-profile space economy name is a meaningful sentiment signal for the theme; the historical-pattern framing is editorial and not a fundamental call, so PM judgment on thesis integrity should drive position decisions rather than the IPO-analogy argument.

- SPCX shares have declined approximately 40% from their post-IPO peak.
- Coverage frames the drawdown against historical mega-IPO performance patterns after comparable pullbacks.
- No new fundamental development cited; the piece is pattern-based and editorial.
- The analysis raises the question of whether the compression follows historical recovery trajectories or signals a fundamental re-rating.
